name: clockify
description: Reads Clockify workspaces, clients, projects, tags, users, tasks, time entries, custom fields, user groups, holidays, expense categories, and time-off policies, and writes clients/projects/tags/tasks through the Clockify REST API v1.

risk.read: external Clockify API read of workspace, client, project, tag, user, task, time entry, and workspace-configuration data
risk.write: external mutation; creates/updates/deletes live Clockify clients, projects, tags, and tasks
risk.approval: required for all write actions; reads remain none
